name: TOUR Golf & Grill
about: TOUR Golf & Grill is a multi-faceted venue featuring indoor golf simulators, a full-service restaurant, and event spaces. It offers patrons the ability to play on over 85 virtual golf courses and access 20+ golf-themed games in a casual, sports-bar-like atmosphere. The venue combines golf simulation with dining, making it suitable for both serious practice and social gatherings. It hosts private events, including birthday parties and corporate functions, and features a bar for watching sports events.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of 85+ virtual courses and 20+ golf-themed games
Combination of high-quality golf simulation with a full-service restaurant and bar
Ability to host events and parties on-site, creating a versatile entertainment destination

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant with a menu available online. Offers vegetarian options.
Full bar service with craft cocktails, beers, and wines available.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides all necessary equipment for the golf simulators. Players do not need to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue has a full-service restaurant and bar available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes varies depending on the number of players and pace of play, but hourly rentals are available.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, TOUR Golf & Grill is kid-friendly, offering a mini-golf course and a welcoming atmosphere for families.
